commands.name: main-process-native-media-unit-tests
commands.stdoutTail:
▶ NativeScreenCapture DMA-BUF metadata validation
  ✔ accepts valid DMA-BUF metadata and pads native plane arrays (2.167459ms)
  ✔ keeps valid handles when optional device UUID metadata is absent or malformed (0.439666ms)
  ✔ rejects invalid plane counts, FDs, strides, and format metadata (0.458916ms)
✔ NativeScreenCapture DMA-BUF metadata validation (3.515292ms)
▶ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting
  ✔ normalizes display and window sources without changing source ids (0.661875ms)
  ✔ starts display and window captures with exact source id and kind and reports diagnostics (1.226708ms)
  ✔ forwards frames to renderer even when a native frame tap is installed (0.477666ms)
  ✔ reports macOS and Linux display/window capture capabilities from platform backends (1.341208ms)
✔ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting (3.829875ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing
  ✔ pushes the initial capture frame after publishing screen share (2.384041ms)
  ✔ prefers Windows shared texture handles over DMA-BUF and CPU frames (0.56125ms)
  ✔ uses Linux DMA-BUF handles before CPU conversion (0.49475ms)
  ✔ falls back to CPU frames when GPU paths are unavailable or rejected (0.461792ms)
  ✔ keeps screen-share audio published when screen video is unpublished (0.516583ms)
  ✔ replaces screen capture taps without releasing screen-share audio or duplicating priority (1.04175ms)
  ✔ forwards watch and unwatch operations with source, enablement, and quality intact (0.860792ms)
  ✔ reports VideoToolbox hardware capability from the native addon (0.46825ms)
  ✔ reports native voice engine capabilities from the native addon (0.402ms)
  ✔ maps native addon microphone not-connected errors to the typed operation code (0.542958ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing (8.310334ms)
▶ WebrtcScreenPublish native frame routing
  ✔ prefers Windows shared texture handles over DMA-BUF and CPU buffers (2.040083ms)
  ✔ uses Linux DMA-BUF handles before CPU conversion (0.431291ms)
  ✔ falls back to CPU frames when GPU paths are unavailable or rejected (0.405292ms)
  ✔ replaces an existing publisher before routing frames for the same capture id (0.398542ms)
✔ WebrtcScreenPublish native frame routing (3.742875ms)

ℹ suites 4
ℹ pass 21

ℹ skipped 0
